author: mark
text:
state_repo: repoint stale legacy .balls/tasks symlink

bl-38dd's ensure_tasks_symlink short-circuited on is_symlink() without inspecting the target, so a repo flipped from legacy to master_url via bl remaster --commit kept its .balls/tasks -> worktree/.balls/tasks symlink. With .balls/worktree/ gone in master_url mode the symlink dangles silently and the ls .balls/tasks/ ergonomic breaks.

Compare the existing symlink's read_link target against the expected relative target and remove-and-recreate on mismatch. Matching targets stay no-ops, the non-symlink guard is unchanged, and state_repo::ensure fires this on the next bl op after a remaster so the heal is automatic.
